title: Heat waves mess with your brain. Scientists are trying to figure out why.

title: AWS Previews FinOps Agent for Cost Analysis and Optimization
summary: Amazon has released AWS FinOps Agent in public preview, a managed service that automates several common FinOps workflows. The agent can investigate cost anomalies, correlate spend changes with AWS activity data, and integrate with tools such as Slack and Jira to route findings to resource owners. By Renato Losio
